title: Administrative rulemaking
doc_html:
§977.25. Administrative rulemaking

            The department shall promulgate all such rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Part.

            Acts 2019, No. 421, §1.
doc_text:
§977.25.  Administrative rulemaking
The department shall promulgate all such rules in accordance with the Administrative
Procedure Act as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Part.
Acts 2019, No. 421, §1.
